code_samples.snippet_text:
def test_fts_fallback_recovers_long_range_candidate_when_anchor_thin(self):
        """FTS fallback should find a cross-document hunk via content match
        when the anchor registry cannot reach it and the sliding window
        has already evicted it."""
        # A distant heading hunk about "Lexical analysis"
        distant_heading = _make_hunk(
            content="2. Lexical analysis describes how tokens are formed.",
            origin_id="memory://lexical_analysis.txt",
            node_kind="md_heading",
            structural_path="doc/h1_lexical_analysis",
            heading_trail=["Lexical analysis"],
        )
        # Filler that pushes distant_heading out of the window
        filler_one = _make_hunk(
            content="filler one unrelated",
            origin_id="memory://filler1.txt",
            node_kind="md_paragraph",
            structural_path="doc/h1_misc/p1",
        )
        filler_two = _make_hunk(
            content="filler two unrelated",
            origin_id="memory://filler2.txt",
            node_kind="md_paragraph",
            structural_path="doc/h1_misc/p2",
        )
        # An index item referencing lexical_analysis — no heading anchor
        # to match on, so anchor registry alone won't reach distant_heading
        index_item = _make_hunk(
            content="* 2. Lexical analysis",
            origin_id="memory://index.txt",
            node_kind="md_list_item",
            structural_path="doc/h1_reference/li_4",
            normalized_cross_refs=["lexical_analysis"],
        )

        with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
            db_path = Path(tmp) / "cold.db"

            # Baseline: no FTS, no anchor — pair should NOT appear
            baseline_nucleus = RecordingNucleus()
            with GraphAssembler(
                db_path,
                baseline_nucleus,
                window_size=2,
                reference_candidate_limit=0,
                fts_candidate_limit=0,
            ) as assembler:
                for hunk in [distant_heading, filler_one, filler_two, index_item]:
                    assembler.ingest_one(hunk)

            baseline_pairs = set(baseline_nucleus.pairs)
            self.assertNotIn(
                (distant_heading.occurrence_id, index_item.occurrence_id),
                baseline_pairs,
                "Baseline should NOT reach the distant heading without FTS or anchors",
            )

            # With FTS fallback enabled
            fts_nucleus = RecordingNucleus()
            db_path_fts = Path(tmp) / "cold_fts.db"
            with GraphAssembler(
                db_path_fts,
                fts_nucleus,
                window_size=2,
                reference_candidate_limit=8,
                fts_candidate_limit=8,
                fts_fallback_thin_threshold=2,
            ) as assembler:
                for hunk in [distant_heading, filler_one, filler_two, index_item]:
                    assembler.ingest_one(hunk)

code_samples.title: def _bag_rank_signals(
code_samples.why_it_matters: Human-facing bag rerank logic showing how readable evidence is preferred without replacing source truth.
code_samples.snippet_text:
def _bag_rank_signals(
    *,
    query_text: str,
    lexical_queries: list[str],
    alias_queries: list[str],
    item: dict[str, Any],
    anchor_occurrence_ids: set[str],
    origin_anchor_count: int,
    origin_query_support_count: int,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    normalized_query = _normalize_whitespace(query_text).lower()
    match_query = _normalize_match_text(query_text)
    normalized_variants = [
        _normalize_whitespace(variant).lower()
        for variant in alias_queries
        if _normalize_whitespace(variant).strip()
    ]
    match_variants = [
        _normalize_match_text(variant)
        for variant in alias_queries
        if _normalize_match_text(variant).strip()
    ]
    normalized_text = _normalize_whitespace(item.get("content", "")).lower()
    match_text = _normalize_match_text(item.get("content", ""))
    query_token_set = set(_query_tokens(query_text))
    text_token_set = set(_query_tokens(normalized_text))
    token_overlap = len(query_token_set & text_token_set)
    char_ngram_score = _char_ngram_jaccard(normalized_query, normalized_text)
    exact_phrase = bool(
        (normalized_query and normalized_query in normalized_text)
        or (match_query and match_query in match_text)
    )
    lexical_variant_hit = any(
        variant != normalized_query and variant in normalized_text
        for variant in normalized_variants
    ) or any(
        variant != match_query and variant in match_text for variant in match_variants
    )
    node_kind = str(item.get("node_kind", ""))
    origin_name = Path(str(item.get("origin_id", ""))).name
    is_heading = node_kind in {"md_heading", "rst_section", "rst_title"}
    is_index_list_item = origin_name == "index.txt" and node_kind == "md_list_item"
    is_anchor_list_item = node_kind == "md_list_item" and item.get("occurrence_id") in anchor_occurrence_ids
    is_fragment = "fragment" in node_kind
    is_code_block = "code_block" in node_kind
    content_length = len(_normalize_whitespace(item.get("content", "")))
    is_short = content_length < 30
    is_anchor = item.get("occurrence_id") in anchor_occurrence_ids
    has_statement_like_punctuation = bool(
        re.search(r"[\"'`:;.]$", normalized_text) or '"' in normalized_text or "'" in normalized_text
    )
    is_short_articulation_label = is_heading or (
        is_index_list_item
        or (is_anchor_list_item and content_length < 80 and has_statement_like_punctuation)
    )
    section_label_bonus = (exact_phrase or lexical_variant_hit) and (
        is_short_articulation_label
    )
    section_locator_bonus = 0.16 if is_index_list_item and exact_phrase and content_length < 60 else 0.0
    articulation_anchor_bonus = (
        0.12
        if lexical_variant_hit and not exact_phrase and is_short_articulation_label
        else 0.0
    )
    origin_anchor_bonus = 0.06 * max(0, origin_query_support_count - 1)

    rank_score = float(item["activation"])
    rank_score += 0.14 if exact_phrase else 0.0
    rank_score += 0.08 if lexical_variant_hit else 0.0
    rank_score += 0.10 if exact_phrase and is_heading else 0.0
    rank_score += 0.08 if is_anchor else 0.0
    rank_score += origin_anchor_bonus
    rank_score += 0.03 * token_overlap
    rank_score += 0.35 * char_ngram_score
    rank_score += 0.07 if section_label_bonus else 0.0
    rank_score += section_locator_bonus
    rank_score += 0.04 if lexical_variant_hit and section_label_bonus else 0.0
    rank_score += articulation_anchor_bonus
    rank_score -= 0.12 if is_index_list_item and not section_label_bonus else 0.0
    rank_score -= 0.04 if is_short and not section_label_bonus else 0.0
    rank_score -= 0.08 if is_fragment else 0.0
    rank_score -= 0.03 if is_code_block else 0.0

    return {
        "rank_score": round(rank_score, 6),
        "exact_phrase": exact_phrase,
        "lexical_variant_hit": lexical_variant_hit,
        "token_overlap": token_overlap,
        "char_ngram_score": round(char_ngram_score, 6),
        "is_anchor": is_anchor,

code_samples.snippet_text:
def _snapshot_from_event(event: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
    return {
        "graph_summary": event.get("graph_summary", {}),
        "training_summary": event.get("training_summary", {}),
        "hub_audit": event.get("hub_audit", {}),
        "samples": event.get("samples", []),
        "surface_fractions": event.get("surface_fractions", {}),
    }


def main() -> int:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument("--event-file", required=True)
    parser.add_argument("--probe-name", required=True)
    parser.add_argument("--out-dir", required=True)
    parser.add_argument("--hold-open", default="0")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    event_file = Path(args.event_file)
    hold_open = args.hold_open == "1"

    import tkinter as tk
    from tkinter import ttk

    root = tk.Tk()
    root.title(f"Probe Monitor - {args.probe_name}")
    root.geometry("1280x820")

    stage_var = tk.StringVar(value="starting")
    counts_var = tk.StringVar(value="waiting for events")
    paths_var = tk.StringVar(value=args.out_dir)
    provider_var = tk.StringVar(value="embedder: pending")
    profile_var = tk.StringVar(value="profile: pending")
    relations_var = tk.StringVar(value="relations: -")
    crossdoc_var = tk.StringVar(value="cross-doc pull: -")
    threshold_var = tk.StringVar(value="above-threshold: -")
    training_var = tk.StringVar(value="training pairs: -")
    modes_var = tk.StringVar(value="modes: -")
    concentration_var = tk.StringVar(value="source concentration: -")

    frame = ttk.Frame(root, padding=10)
    frame.pack(fill="both", expand=True)

    ttk.Label(frame, text=f"Probe: {args.probe_name}").pack(anchor="w")
    ttk.Label(frame, textvariable=stage_var).pack(anchor="w", pady=(6, 0))
    ttk.Label(frame, textvariable=counts_var).pack(anchor="w", pady=(2, 8))
    ttk.Label(frame, textvariable=provider_var).pack(anchor="w")
    ttk.Label(frame, textvariable=profile_var).pack(anchor="w", pady=(0, 8))
    ttk.Label(frame, text="Output").pack(anchor="w")
    ttk.Label(frame, textvariable=paths_var, wraplength=820).pack(anchor="w", pady=(0, 8))

    metrics_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(frame, text="Live Metrics", padding=8)
    metrics_frame.pack(fill="x", expand=False, pady=(0, 10))
    ttk.Label(metrics_frame, textvariable=relations_var).grid(row=0, column=0, sticky="w", padx=(0, 18))
    ttk.Label(metrics_frame, textvariable=crossdoc_var).grid(row=0, column=1, sticky="w", padx=(0, 18))
    ttk.Label(metrics_frame, textvariable=threshold_var).grid(row=1, column=0, sticky="w", padx=(0, 18))
    ttk.Label(metrics_frame, textvariable=training_var).grid(row=1, column=1, sticky="w", padx=(0, 18))
    ttk.Label(metrics_frame, textvariable=modes_var, wraplength=1180).grid(row=2, column=0, columnspan=2, sticky="w", pady=(6, 0))
    ttk.Label(metrics_frame, textvariable=concentration_var, wraplength=1180).grid(row=3, column=0, columnspan=2, sticky="w", pady=(2, 0))

    legend = ttk.Frame(frame)
    legend.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 8))
    ttk.Label(legend, text="Surface Colors:").pack(side="left")
    for surface, color in SURFACE_COLORS.items():
        swatch = tk.Label(legend, text=f" {surface} ", bg=color, fg="white")
        swatch.pack(side="left", padx=4)

    notebook = ttk.Notebook(frame)
    notebook.pack(fill="both", expand=True)

    summary_tab = ttk.Frame(notebook, padding=8)
    samples_tab = ttk.Frame(notebook, padding=8)
    logs_tab = ttk.Frame(notebook, padding=8)
    notebook.add(summary_tab, text="Summary")
    notebook.add(samples_tab, text="Samples")
    notebook.add(logs_tab, text="Logs")

    summary_text = tk.Text(summary_tab, wrap="word", height=22)
    summary_text.pack(fill="both", expand=True)

    samples_text = tk.Text(samples_tab, wrap="word", height=22)
    samples_text.pack(fill="both", expand=True)
    for surface, color in SURFACE_COLORS.items():
        samples_text.tag_config(surface, foreground=color)
        summary_text.tag_config(surface, foreground=color)

    text = tk.Text(logs_tab, height=22, wrap="none")
    text.pack(fill="both", expand=True)

    summary = {
        "splitter_lines": 0,
        "emitter_lines": 0,
        "stage": "starting",
    }
    complete_seen = False
    position = 0
    def _set_report_snapshot(snapshot: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
        graph_summary = snapshot.get("graph_summary", {})
        training_summary = snapshot.get("training_summary", {})
        hub_audit = snapshot.get("hub_audit", {})
        samples = snapshot.get("samples", [])
        surface_fractions = snapshot.get("surface_fractions", {})
        relations_var.set(f"relations: {graph_summary.get('relations', '-')}")
        crossdoc_var.set(
            f"cross-doc pull: {graph_summary.get('cross_document_nucleus_pull_count', '-')}"
        )
        threshold_var.set(
            f"above-threshold: {training_summary.get('above_threshold', '-')}"
        )
        training_var.set(f"training pairs: {training_summary.get('count', '-')}")
        modes_var.set(
            "modes: " + _top_modes(graph_summary.get("interaction_modes", {}))
        )
        source_concentration = graph_summary.get("cross_document_source_concentration", {})
        concentration_var.set(
            "source concentration: "
            f"origins={source_concentration.get('unique_origins', '-')}, "
            f"top1={source_concentration.get('top_1_share', '-')}, "
            f"top3={source_concentration.get('top_3_share', '-')}"
        )
